title: t1000_e gateway build fails on missing LR1110 source
description: Why this exists: while validating project-LICHEN-9nrr.1, a focused build of lichen/apps/gateway for board t1000_e/nrf52840 reached CMake generation but failed before compiling the app because lichen/drivers/lora/lr1110/CMakeLists.txt references modules/lib/loramac-node/src/radio/lr1110/lr1110_driver/src/lr1110_radio.c, which is absent in the local module checkout. This blocks using the T1000-E native gateway configuration as a validation target. What needs to be done: verify the intended LoRaMac-node revision or vendor source layout, update the module pin or LR1110 driver CMake source list accordingly, and add/restore a build check for the T1000-E gateway target. Acceptance: west build -b t1000_e/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway configures and compiles, preserving LR1110 support; after implementation/tests complete two separate code-review passes and file follow-up Beads for findings.
